mapper.select: SELECT A.* , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS RGT_DTM_FMT , DATE_FORMAT(A.UPD_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS UPD_DTM_FMT FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update:
INSERT INTO TB_PROPERTY ( PROP_CD, PROP_NM, PROP_TYPE, DEAL_TYPE, SELL_PRICE, DEPOSIT, MONTHLY_RENT, MGMT_COST, AREA_EXCLUSIVE, AREA_SUPPLY, ROOM_CNT, BATH_CNT, FLOOR_NO, FLOOR_TOTAL, DIRECTION, ENTRANCE_TYPE, PARKING, HEATING, BUILD_YEAR, MOVE_IN_DATE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, LAT, LNG, BADGE_TYPE, MAIN_YN, MAIN_YN_DTM, SOLD_YN, PROP_DESC, ATCH_FILE_KEY, USE_YN, DEL_YN, RGT_USR_CD, RGT_DTM, UPD_USR_CD, UPD_DTM ) VALUES ( #{propCd}, #{propNm}, #{propType}, #{dealType}, #{sellPrice}, #{deposit}, #{monthlyRent}, #{mgmtCost}, #{areaExclusive}, #{areaSupply}, #{roomCnt}, #{bathCnt}, #{floorNo}, #{floorTotal}, #{direction}, #{entranceType}, #{parking}, #{heating}, #{buildYear}, #{moveInDate}, #{address}, #{addressDtl}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{badgeType}, #{mainYn}, #{mainYnDtm}, #{soldYn}, #{propDesc}, #{atchFileKey}, 'Y', 'N', #{ssnUsrCd}, NOW(), #{ssnUsrCd}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE PROP_NM = #{propNm}, PROP_TYPE = #{propType}, DEAL_TYPE = #{dealType}, SELL_PRICE = #{sellPrice}, DEPOSIT = #{deposit}, MONTHLY_RENT = #{monthlyRent}, MGMT_COST = #{mgmtCost}, AREA_EXCLUSIVE = #{areaExclusive}, AREA_SUPPLY = #{areaSupply}, ROOM_CNT = #{roomCnt}, BATH_CNT = #{bathCnt}, FLOOR_NO = #{floorNo}, FLOOR_TOTAL = #{floorTotal}, DIRECTION = #{direction}, ENTRANCE_TYPE = #{entranceType}, PARKING = #{parking}, HEATING = #{heating}, BUILD_YEAR = #{buildYear}, MOVE_IN_DATE = #{moveInDate}, ADDRESS = #{address}, ADDRESS_DTL = #{addressDtl}, LAT = #{lat}, LNG = #{lng}, BADGE_TYPE = #{badgeType}, MAIN_YN = #{mainYn}, MAIN_YN_DTM = #{mainYnDtm}, SOLD_YN = #{soldYn}, PROP_DESC = #{propDesc},
ATCH_FILE_KEY = #{atchFileKey},
UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd}, UPD_DTM = NOW()
UPDATE TB_PROPERTY SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , USE_YN = 'N' , UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd} , UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
